Devran Tidewell is the founder of Bramblevolt Co. Devran raised concerns about gross margin at the last board sync.

---
title: Bramblevolt Co

summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Devran Tidewell.

Bramblevolt Co is a seed-stage company. Founded by Devran Tidewell. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Bramblevolt Co call with Devran Tidewell.
Devran is worried the Bramblevolt Co pricing model undercuts their gross margin. Real concern for the round.
I committed to sending Devran the diligence checklist by Friday.
